name: CT Angiography Pulmonary
description: CT angiography of the pulmonary arteries for evaluation of pulmonary embolism

findings.technique: CT angiography of the pulmonary arteries was performed following intravenous contrast administration with bolus tracking.
findings.comparison: No prior studies available for comparison.

sections.name: Main Pulmonary Artery
sections.content: The main pulmonary artery is [normal in caliber / not enlarged / no filling defect]. No central pulmonary embolism.

sections.name: Right Pulmonary Artery
sections.content: The right main pulmonary artery demonstrates [no filling defect / no intraluminal filling defect / no acute pulmonary embolism]. The segmental branches are [patent / no defect].

sections.name: Left Pulmonary Artery
sections.content: The left main pulmonary artery demonstrates [no filling defect / no intraluminal filling defect / no acute pulmonary embolism]. The segmental branches are [patent / no defect].

sections.name: Segmental Branches
sections.content: All segmental pulmonary arterial branches are [patent / no filling defect / no embolism]. No segmental pulmonary artery occlusion.

sections.name: Right Heart
sections.content: The right atrium and right ventricle are [normal in size / not dilated / no evidence of right heart strain]. No paradoxical embolism.

sections.name: Left Heart
sections.content: The left atrium and left ventricle are [normal in size / no cardiomegaly]. The coronary arteries are [not evaluated / normal].

sections.name: Lung Parenchyma
sections.content: The lung parenchyma demonstrates [no wedge-shaped opacities / no Hampton hump / no infarction]. The lungs are otherwise [unremarkable / clear].

sections.name: Other Findings
sections.content: No aortic aneurysm or dissection. No significant mediastinal lymphadenopathy.

impression:
1. Normal CT angiography of the pulmonary arteries.
2. No pulmonary embolism identified in the main, lobar, or segmental pulmonary arteries.
3. No evidence of right heart strain.
author: RadReport Templates
